title: CRM Signals and Key Events for Onboarding and Activation
description:
Build an event logging model for application usage that captures key user lifecycle events and streams them to Zapier for CRM integration.

A new `events_log` table stores event data with fields: `userid`, `orgid`, `eventid`, `eventdate`, `eventname`, and `message`. Three initial events are defined:

- **Event 0001 — First Time Login**: Triggered when a new user record is created in the database. Posts to a Zapier webhook.
- **Event 0002 — SFDC Login**: Triggered on every login. Posts to a separate Zapier webhook.
- **Event 0003 — Onboarded Salesforce Fields**: Triggered the first time a user drills into a Salesforce object and field metadata is written to the local database. Posts to a third Zapier webhook.

Each event sends a POST body with a `DTSignal` payload containing the signal namespace, user/org identifiers, event metadata, and timestamp. The email field was removed from the events table per discussion — a foreign key relationship to the users table via `userid` is used instead.
acceptance_criteria: Events log table is created with userid, orgid, eventid, eventdate, eventname, and message columns
Event 0001 fires on first-time user record creation and posts to the designated Zapier webhook
Event 0002 fires on every Salesforce login and posts to its Zapier webhook
Event 0003 fires when Salesforce field metadata is first written for an object and posts to its Zapier webhook
POST body follows the DTSignal schema with signal_namespace, userid, orgid, eventid, eventdate, eventname, and message
Email is not stored in the events log table; userid serves as the foreign key to the users table
middleware_changes: New event logging service that captures lifecycle events (first login, every login, first object drill-down) and dispatches POST requests to Zapier webhook endpoints with the DTSignal payload.
data_model_changes: New events_log table with columns: userid (FK to users), orgid, eventid, eventdate, eventname, message.
api_changes: Outbound POST calls to three Zapier webhook URLs with DTSignal JSON payload for each event type.
implementation_notes: Events are triggered inline during login and object drill-down flows. Zapier webhooks are called via curl requests. Email was intentionally excluded from the events table in favor of a foreign key relationship to the users table.
comment_summary: Discussion confirmed email should be excluded from the events log table in favor of a FK to users. Developer asked about Zapier integration approach and was directed to use the webhook URLs. Testing confirmed the login event worked correctly.
